历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 8913 → 9718 → 10123 → 11272 → 12735, showing a continuous backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 3822 places over the past 4 years, and a baseline of about 12735 in 2025; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 63 in 2021–2022, 55 in 2023, 51 in 2024, 48 in 2025, and 51 in 2026, a slight increase of 3 students compared to 2025, an expansion rate of about 6.25%, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (including Qinhuangdao Campus) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, ranked about 38th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, stable in the top 40 in recent years, with a relatively high school level; in 2025, the main campus of Northeastern University had a student internship safety incident (somewhat negative), and the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed (campus controversy); Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, rated as 'average', overall attention is not high, no obvious abnormal signal of application popularity; relying on Northeastern University's discipline evaluation results: Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Metallurgical Engineering A, Mechanical Engineering A-, Materials Science and Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, among which enrollment majors such as Computer, Automation, and Electronic Information correspond to strong disciplines, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering have been highly recommended from 2024 to 2026, with high social popularity; the number of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province increased from 117,000 in 2021 to 192,000 in 2025, estimated at about 204,000 in 2026, with the candidate scale continuously expanding, intensifying competition; Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Qinhuangdao City, Hebei Province, not a local university in the province, with no regional enrollment preference in Fujian; its enrollment scale in Fujian is small (about 48–63 students in Physics Category), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact from regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings (average backward shift of about 950 places per year), the slight expansion of the 2026 plan (+3 students) partially easing competition pressure, the continuous growth of Physics Category candidates in Fujian Province intensifying competition, and the sustained high popularity of hot majors like Computer and Electronic Information attracting high-scoring candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 12735, the ranking is expected to continue moving backward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 13350, with a range of 13000–14000.

- Electronic Information Engineering.

- Intelligent Perception Engineering

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 13000–14000, it is recommended to mainly fill in Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach options and Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than 13000, focus on reaching for flagship majors like Computer Science and Technology and Automation; for rankings after 13500, it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors like Mathematics and Mechanical, with Tier 3 majors like Materials and Economics as safe choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were 1920 → 1854 → 2103 → 2129 → 2338, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 484 places in the last 3 years. The 2025 baseline is approximately 2338. The provincial History Category enrollment plan was 3 students in 2021–2022, 5 in 2023, 9 in 2024–2025, and 9 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, indicating a stable plan.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Northeastern University (including Qinhuangdao Campus) is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. On the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 38th in 2026. The university has a relatively high level, which is also attractive to History Category students. In 2025, the main campus of Northeastern University had a slightly negative incident (student internship accident), and the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 82nd, rated as 'average', with overall low attention. Northeastern University's advantageous disciplines are mainly engineering (Control Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science A, etc.), while the History Category enrollment majors (Economics, Business Administration, Foreign Languages and Literature) have low correlation with the university's strengths, providing limited support from discipline evaluations.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Economics is divided and wait-and-see, Business Administration (Accounting/Finance) is recommended, Foreign Languages and Literature is generally wait-and-see, with overall medium popularity. The number of History Category examinees in Fujian Province decreased from 78,000 in 2021 to 60,000 in 2025, and is estimated to be about 64,000 in 2026, showing a slight rebound. Northeastern University at Qinhuangdao is located in Hebei Province, not a local university in Fujian, and its History Category enrollment scale in Fujian is very small (3–9 students), so cross-provincial enrollment is limited by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the slight rebound in the number of History Category examinees, and the limited appeal of the university's engineering advantages to History Category students, the ranking is expected to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 2338. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2400, with a range of 2300–2500.
